title: Importing Excel docs to Monday.com

posts.author: maricn (Mariana Elias)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to import a contact spreadsheet to Monday.com ( it has about 300 lines).
I tried to insert all at once, but it keep spinning (preparing data) and never stops.
So I separated the data, and tried to add with 10 lines, but it still the same.
I might be doing something wrong, however I am following the steps here from the help monday.com page.
Could someone help me with that?
Thank you

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mariana,

Sorry you’re running into this issue! Can you confirm if this issue persists in a private window (incognito)?

posts.author: maricn (Mariana Elias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Yes, it still happens.

Is there something I am doing wrong?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hm this sounds a bit strange…

Can you confirm if you’re importing via this route?

Screen Shot 2023-11-07 at 11.24.11 am1250×872 67.1 KB

If you’re still running into an issue here, please direct message me with a recording of the steps you’re taking incase we need to escalate this to our tech team - you can use loom.com

posts.author: maricn (Mariana Elias)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, I did a video, however I don’t want to share it here. How can I show you without sending you a link?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Mariana, Ive received your email and replied
